evidence.snippet: 50cc Single-Cylinder FlexDI™ Fully Integrated HFE Propulsion System for UAVs

items.notes: Heavy fuel 2-stroke UAV engines: 50HFE, 75HFE, 150HFE, 350HFE — complete integrated propulsion systems sold to UAV OEMs.

evidence.snippet:
ORBITAL PMS
Advanced Power Management System

**It keeps your UAV’s critical systems powered.
Cleanly, continuously, and intelligently
‍**Orbital’s PMS conditions and prioritises power, automatically switches between alternator / battery / shore, protects the avionics bus, and reports health via telemetry, so missions continue even when supply or load changes.

items.notes: PMS (Power Management System) — conditions and switches between alternator/battery/shore power, protects avionics bus.

evidence.snippet:
FlexECU™
========

Intelligent electronic propulsion management system

items.notes: FlexECU™ engine management system is bundled as part of each HFE engine package — not sold separately but integral to the IPS.

evidence.snippet:
### Australia
4 Whipple Street, Balcatta,
Western Australia, 6021

Orbital helps UAV manufacturers outperform their competition by delivering advanced propulsion systems engineered specifically for maximum reliability, seamless integration, and **mission-critical performance**.
The Boeing Insitu ScanEagle uses **Orbital's 50HFE Integrated Propulsion System** highlighting the performance and reliability required by Tier 1 Defence customers.

drone_supply_chain_role.notes: Orbital supplies complete Integrated Propulsion Systems (engine + ECU + harness + mounting + alternator) to UAV OEMs such as Boeing Insitu (ScanEagle) and Textron (Aerosonde MK 4.8). Not an airframe OEM.

evidence.snippet:
ORBITAL PMS
Advanced Power Management System
**1,200,000+ Hours operating in heat, cold, dust, and rain** Orbital propulsion systems deliver the proven reliability and performance to make your UAV a market leader.

Standardised configurations of Orbital’s renowned Integrated Propulsion Systems with the same reliability and performance built on a 20 year pedigree - delivered faster and at a lower price point for OEMs seeking **market leading Over Line of Sight (OLS) propulsion**. Configure from proven options and ship.

readiness.notes: Over 1,200,000 operational hours logged fleet-wide; 250,000+ hours on the 50HFE alone. Standardised 'Mission-Ready Engines' catalog with brochures (dated 2025). Production customers include Boeing Insitu and Textron.

tagline: Australian subsystem supplier of heavy-fuel piston engines (50–350 cc) and power-management systems for tactical UAVs. Four production engine variants with FlexDI™ direct injection achieve 3.6–28.4 hp; 150HFE is MIL-STD-810H qualified and integrated on Textron Aerosonde. Claims 1.2M+ flight hours. NDAA and Blue UAS certification status unknown; no public US defense contracts named.
